title: Verify Cyrillic filename handling for media
description: Ensure that the backend (FastAPI + StaticFiles) and Nginx can correctly serve files with Cyrillic filenames. 1. Create a dummy file with a Cyrillic name in 'backend/media/test_кир.png' 2. Try to fetch it using 'curl' to 'http://localhost:8000/media/test_кир.png' (encoded as needed) 3. Verify it returns 200. Also check if the 'StaticFiles' setup handles normalization if necessary.
acceptance_criteria: Test with Cyrillic filename passes via FastAPI StaticFiles
